title: External assurance witness — required lane separation fields

lane.description: Witness belongs to parallel assurance track — not engineering maturity

blocksIR.description: true only for explicit Class S ceremony with blocksIR in human-gates manifest

blocksAnyRepo.description: Vendor calendar must never freeze sibling repos

procurementSegment.description: Deal qualification segment — not integrator-pilot default

dealQualificationOnly.description: Evidence qualifies regulated buyers — not v1 Africa release predicate

forbiddenPhrases: product not mature because pen-test pending
preferredPhrases: Engineering maturity complete; procurement segment open
